zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance de London於大約1270年出生在英國戴文拉肯福德時，她的父親Stephen de London27歲，母親De Sydeham22歲。她於大約1309年與Alexander de Cruwys III在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世在英國戴文易亞斯特 安斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constance de London于大约1270年出生在英国戴文拉肯福德时，她的父亲Stephen de London27岁，母亲De Sydeham22岁。她于大约1309年与Alexander de Cruwys III在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世在英国戴文易亞斯特 安斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: London
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone who came from London or a nickname for someone who had made a trip to London or had some other connection with the city. In some cases however, the Jewish name was purely artificial. The placename, recorded by the Roman historian Tacitus in the Latinized form Londinium, is obscure in origin and meaning, but may be derived from pre-Celtic (Old European) roots with a meaning something like ‘place at the navigable or unfordable river’.

variants.name: Lonon
meanings: English: probably a variant of   London  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Constance de London was born about 1270, in Rackenford, Devon, England, her father, Stephen de London, was 27 and her mother, De Sydeham, was 22. She married Alexander de Cruwys III about 1309, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in East Anstey, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance de Londonが約1270年にイギリスデボンラクエンフォードで生まれた時，父Stephen de Londonは27歳，母De Sydehamは22歳であった。約1309年にイギリスイギリスデボンでAlexander de Cruwys IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスデボンエアスト アンステイで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Constance de London(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 데폰 라c켄퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Stephen de London(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 De Sydeham(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1309년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Alexander de Cruwys III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 데폰 이스트 앤스테이에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance de London родилась около 1270 г. в местности раккенфорд, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Stephen de London было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали De Sydeham, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander de Cruwys III около 1309 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в местности эаст ансти, девон, Англия.
